title: China’s State Media Turns to Social Media and AI to Tell Its Story - and Often Mock the US
description: BEIJING (AP) — The messaging from China’s Communist government may once have been dogmatic and rigid — not anymore. Having largely tamed the internet at home with tight censorship, Beijing is now tapping the power of social media and artificial intelligence to tell its story — and often to skewer the U.S. and its president.
content: BEIJING (AP) — The messaging from China’s Communist government may once have been dogmatic and rigid — not anymore. Having largely tamed the internet at home with tight censorship, Beijing is now tapping the power of social media and artificial intel... [5386 chars]

title: How AI helped 1 man (and his brother) build a US$1.8 billion company
description: Who needs more than two employees when artificial intelligence can do so many corporate tasks? It's super efficient – and a little bit lonely.
content:
LOS ANGELES: Matthew Gallagher took just two months, US$20,000 (RM79,626) and more than a dozen artificial intelligence tools to get his startup off the ground.
From his house in Los Angeles, Gallagher, 41, used AI to write the code for the software ... [9430 chars]

title: Former OpenAI Stargate Leaders Plan to Join Meta Platforms
description: Three key players in OpenAI’s massive effort to set up hundreds of billions of dollars’ worth of artificial intelligence data center capacity are joining Meta Platforms Inc., according to people familiar with the matter.
content:

title: Banks Warned About Anthropic’s New, Powerful A.I. Technology
description: In an unusual move, the Treasury secretary and the Federal Reserve chair gathered bank executives to caution about cyberthreats posed by artificial intelligence.
content: The leaders of some of America’s largest banks were warned by a top government official this week about a new artificial intelligence model from Anthropic that could lead to heightened risks of cyberattacks, according to three people briefed on the m... [1761 chars]

title: Minister says AI safety institute now looking at OpenAI protocols
description: Canada’s AI safety institute has now gained access to all of OpenAI’s “protocols,” Artificial Intelligence Minister Evan Solomon said Friday.
content:
Canada’s AI safety institute has now gained access to all of OpenAI’s “protocols,” Artificial Intelligence Minister Evan Solomon said Friday.
Solomon added the AI Safety Institute is working on a report and promised that “we will get accountability.”... [1620 chars]

title: Use of artificial intelligence in arbitration should be regulated, not shunned: CJI Surya Kant
description: NEW DELHI, Apr 10 : Chief Justice of India Surya Kant on Friday said the use of artificial technology in arbitration should not be shunned over concerns of confidentiality and independent decision-making; instead, its use should be regulated through a procedural framework. CJI Kant emphasised that protocols on cyber security and confidentiality should “keep pace” so that technology becomes arbitration’s “powerful ally” in a fast-paced world. The country’s top judge was speaking at the inaugural session of the Indian Council […]

title: Minister lays out innovation vision
description: Higher Education, Science, Research and Innovation Minister Yodchanan Wongsawat has set out an ambitious vision for Thailand to "win the tech war" by achieving technological sovereignty as part of his eight strategic pillars to address national challenges through research and innovation, particularly in artificial intelligence (AI) and semiconductors.
